code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Prov as Provider System
    participant Intake as Intake Service
    participant Rules as Rule Engine
    participant RAG as RAG Service
    participant CLF as Predictive Model
    participant Fuse as Fusion
    participant Expl as Explanation Builder
    participant Rev as Reviewer App
    participant Ledger as Decision Ledger

    Prov->>Intake: Submit PA + clinical docs
    Intake->>Rules: Evaluate policy criteria(Education_StudentDB)
    Intake->>RAG: Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity
    Intake->>CLF: Predict approval probability
    Rules-->>Fuse: rule hits/misses
    RAG-->>Fuse: grounded rationale w/ citations
    CLF-->>Fuse: score + top factors
    Fuse-->Expl: composite decision context
    Expl-->>Rev: Explanation Packet + checklist
    Rev->>Ledger: Store packet (Education_ClassroomService)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个PA（Prior Authorization）审批的完整流程图。核心是从Provider System提交申请开始，经过Intake Service分发，然后有三条并行的评估线：规则引擎判断、RAG检索政策、以及预测模型打分。最后这三路结果要融合，生成解释报告给审核员。
明白了。关于数据源，我看到规则引擎需要查询Education_StudentDB，而最终的Decision Ledger要写入Education_ClassroomService——这两个教育系统相关的数据库，我理解对吗？还是说这是跨领域的命名？
对，命名有点特殊但没错。Education_StudentDB是规则引擎评估时用的策略数据源，Education_ClassroomService是审核完成后存储决策包的目标系统。继续画吧。
好的，我先画出主干：Prov到Intake的提交箭头，然后Intake分出三路——到Rules、RAG和CLF。这里Intake到Rules的调用我会标注上Evaluate policy criteria(Education_StudentDB)。
等等，RAG那条线需要更明确——不是泛泛的检索，要体现"Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity"这个动作。还有，三路结果到Fusion的箭头要用虚线，表示它们是异步汇聚，不是直接调用。
收到，我调整一下。之前我把Rules到Fuse画成实线了，改成虚线。RAG的标注也更新为"Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity"。另外CLF到Fuse的返回我标注为"score + top factors"。
可以。接下来Fusion把综合结果给Explanation Builder，生成解释包，然后Reviewer App审核，最后存入Ledger。Ledger的存储动作记得标注Education_ClassroomService。
完成。Fuse到Expl是"composite decision context"，Expl到Rev是"Explanation Packet + checklist"，Rev到Ledger是"Store packet (Education_ClassroomService)"。整个流程从Provider提交到最终归档，九步编号都加上了。
